questions.question: Prove that the language L = {ww | w is a palindrome} is context-free using the Pumping Lemma. Show that it is not possible to construct a context-free automaton that recognizes L. Provide your reasons in 1-2 sentences.

Use the Pumping Lemma to prove that the language L = {a^n b^n | n > 0} is not context-free. Show that the pumping lemma implies this result. You may assume you have already studied the pumping lemma for context-free languages.

Consider a string w in the language L = {ww | w is a palindrome}. Choose a word u from L such that |u| = p(w). Construct the strings v and x as follows: v = uwku and x = u. Show that the pumping lemma implies that there is a string in L with a factor v that can be replaced by a string y such that |y| <= p and |vy| = |v|, |y|x is not in L. Explain why this shows that L is not context-free.
